generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and someone who cares deeply about our safety, I've been really concerned about the recent discussions on alliance commitments. Did you know that our current approach might actually be making us LESS safe? Experts are saying that by relying too much on others, we're losing our ability to protect ourselves when it really counts. It's time to focus on strengthening OUR defenses first. #NationalSecurity #StrongAtHome
